headline: Uber Legal Pressures And AI Expansion Create Valuation Question For Investors
summary: A federal judge is weighing whether to advance FTC claims that Uber misled users about how to cancel its Uber One subscription. At the same time, Uber is lobbying to limit riders’ ability to sue over sexual assault and other safety incidents tied to its platform. These legal and regulatory pressures are unfolding as Uber expands its use of autonomous vehicles and AI and manages key executive departures. For investors watching Uber Technologies, NYSE:UBER, the mix of regulatory scrutiny and...

headline: Gas Prices Turn the Gig Worker Economy Upside Down
summary: Drivers and delivery workers are adjusting schedules, turning down longer drives, and working more hours to make up for lost income.
